game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ShellShock Live** ShellShock Live is a turn-based online multiplayer tank combat game set in destructible 2D environments. During a player's turn, they use on-screen sliders or drag gestures to precisely adjust their tank's turret angle (0-180 degrees) and shot power (0-100%) before firing one of hundreds of available weapons. Each weapon possesses unique properties, such as a Bazooka dealing 50-100 HP damage or a Digger creating a large crater, with wind direction and strength displayed on the UI influencing projectile trajectories. Players earn XP from matches to level up, unlocking new tanks with varying HP (e.g., 500-1000 HP), more powerful weapons, and cosmetic gear. The objective is to eliminate all opposing tanks by reducing their HP to zero, with difficulty scaling as players unlock more complex weapons and face higher-skilled opponents.
game_info.description: ShellShock Live is a turn-based artillery combat game where you command a tank against enemy forces. Adjust your turret angle and power to launch projectiles across destructible terrain, accounting for wind effects. Destroy all enemy tanks to win, but don't let them destroy you first! Earn points for successful hits and strategic play. The terrain crumbles with each impact, changing the battlefield dynamically.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Adjust turret angle
Arrow Up/Down: Adjust shot power
Space: Fire projectile
Z: Switch to next weapon (when unlocked)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and firing mechanics. Validates that the player can adjust angle and power, fire projectiles, and that projectiles interact with terrain and enemies correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly adjust angle and power parameters, then fire projectiles. Test different combinations to ensure the shooting mechanics work across various scenarios. Validate that projectiles follow physics and interact with terrain.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Projectiles are successfully fired with varying trajectories based on angle and power. Terrain destruction occurs on impact. The game responds correctly to all input combinations without errors.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and firing mechanics. Validates that the player can adjust angle and power, fire projectiles, and that projectiles interact with terrain and enemies correctly.

TEST_1.expected: Projectiles are successfully fired with varying trajectories based on angle and power. Terrain destruction occurs on impact. The game responds correctly to all input combinations without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal strategy to win the game by eliminating all enemy tanks. This validates the win condition and demonstrates intelligent gameplay that accounts for wind, distance, and terrain.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Calculate optimal angle and power based on enemy tank positions, current wind conditions, and terrain layout. Aim for direct hits or near-misses that cause splash damage. Adjust strategy based on terrain changes from previous shots.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully eliminates all enemy tanks within a reasonable number of turns. Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state. Demonstrates intelligent targeting and adaptation to changing battlefield conditions.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests weapon switching mechanics and validates that different weapons have distinct behaviors and effects on gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Cycle through available weapons using the Z key and fire each weapon type to verify unique characteristics. Test that weapons unlock based on score progression and that switching works seamlessly during gameplay.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Different weapons exhibit unique behaviors (explosion size, damage, trajectory). Weapon switching functions correctly. Unlocking system works based on score thresholds.
TEST_3.description: Tests weapon switching mechanics and validates that different weapons have distinct behaviors and effects on gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy: Cycle through available weapons using the Z key and fire each weapon type to verify unique characteristics. Test that weapons unlock based on score progression and that switching works seamlessly during gameplay.
TEST_3.expected: Different weapons exhibit unique behaviors (explosion size, damage, trajectory). Weapon switching functions correctly. Unlocking system works based on score thresholds.
